name: Performance - HR Policy Query Response Time Under Load
description: Measures the average response time of the /api/ask endpoint under concurrent load to ensure it meets performance requirements.
input: Simultaneous POST requests (e.g., 50 concurrent) to /api/ask with valid queries and tokens
output: Average and percentile response times for all requests
success_criteria: Average response time is below 2 seconds
99th percentile response time is below 5 seconds
No more than 5% of requests fail
